productDisplayName: John Players Men Orange And Blue Check Shirt
description: Style noteThis john players shirt gets a sartorial stamp of approval, with its refined collar, silhouetted tailoring and its fine, luxe fabric. Make the right impression with this shirt - be it on lazy weekends or during after-hours dinner. The best bet for semi-formal Fridays, wear this with fitted denims and ankle boots!Product DetailsOrange and blue checked shirt, has short sleeves, spread collar, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, brand embroidered on the pocket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonDry clean or machine wash with like colours onlyUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededLine dry inside-out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitJohn Players' Trim FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
